# Leviosa Labs

> Leviosa Labs builds Chain Reaction, the AI operating system for home services and construction businesses in the United States. Four products cover the full job lifecycle: Catalyst (sales intelligence), Solvent (permit intelligence), Reactor (operations intelligence), and Bond (customer intelligence). Each product works alone; together they hand work to each other automatically, from first lead to finished job.

Leviosa Labs serves home services business owners, general contractors, and construction companies. The core problem it solves: these businesses run on disconnected tools, so slow replies, stalled permits, and missed handoffs quietly lose customers they already won.

## Products

- [Catalyst · Sales Intelligence](https://leviosalabs.io/catalyst): Scores every lead in seconds, builds proposals in 28 seconds, and revives dead pipelines. Sub-30-day sales cycles and 2x proposals per rep.
- [Solvent · Permit Intelligence](https://leviosalabs.io/solvent): Assembles, files, and auto-corrects permits across 2,400+ jurisdictions, with corrections answered in 4 minutes. 96% first-pass approval, 85% faster turnaround.
- [Reactor · Operations Intelligence](https://leviosalabs.io/reactor): Schedules crews, tracks inventory and budgets, and re-optimizes the day the moment anything changes. 98% on-time dispatch, 2.4x jobs per month.
- [Bond · Customer Intelligence](https://leviosalabs.io/bond): Every call, permit, and job update flows into one living customer record. Zero hours of manual data entry per week, 360-degree customer view.

## Pricing

- [Pricing](https://leviosalabs.io/pricing): Plans for each product and the full Chain Reaction suite.
